_notes.elevation_rule: Attributes are placed at the highest node where ALL children share them. If only some children share an attribute, it lives on those specific children.
_notes.unit_required: true means a unit must be selected when setting the value (e.g. length=12, unit=ft). false means it is a free-text or unitless value.

_units_to_add.name: Percent
_units_to_add.description: Percentage value (moisture content, slope, elongation, etc.)

_units_to_add.name: Minutes
_units_to_add.description: Working time, set time, pot life

_units_to_add.name: Mil
_units_to_add.description: Thousandths of an inch — poly sheeting, wear layers, film

_units_to_add.name: Fluid Ounce
_units_to_add.description: US fluid ounce for cartridge, tube, and pail volume
